---
mode: ask
description: Design a new lab outline from a topic and learning objectives
---

[agents/outline-builder.md](../../agents/outline-builder.md)

Design a new lab outline using the agent definition above.

**Fill in before running:**
- Topic or capability: [what concept or workflow should the lab teach?]
- Target audience: [e.g., SQL developer new to MongoDB]
- Environment: [VS Code / Codespaces / other]
- Constraints: [tooling, language, out-of-scope topics — leave blank for defaults]

Output saves to `labs/outlines/{name}-outline.md`.
